description: Robot-mode contract replay corpus (bd-fxj4f.1). Each fixture pins a captured envelope shape so the contract assertions stay green across surface refactors. Adding a surface = one fixture per outcome (success / failure / unavailable). Stdout payloads are inline so the harness stays repo-local.

fixtures.name: robot_status_success
fixtures.notes: Empty-state happy path: all three required arrays are present as [].

fixtures.name: robot_send_session_not_found
fixtures.notes: Documented failure: success=false, non-empty error + error_code, exit code 1.

fixtures.name: robot_cass_status_unavailable

stdout.error: cass binary not installed; falling back to no-op
stdout.hint: install cass to enable cross-agent search

fixtures.notes: Unavailable: success=false with NOT_IMPLEMENTED error_code and exit code 2 (the documented 'unavailable' value).
